name: google-workspace-admin-ui
description: Google Workspace Admin Management UI - GAM alternative with web interface

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test:e2e:read: npm run test:e2e:auth && dotenv -e .env.test -- playwright test --grep @read
scripts.test:e2e:mutating: npm run test:e2e:auth && npm run test:e2e:fixtures && dotenv -e .env.test -- playwright test --grep @mutating
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:auth && npm run test:e2e:fixtures && dotenv -e .env.test -- playwright test
scripts.test:all: npm run type-check && npm run test:security && dotenv -e .env.test -- env TEST_MUTATIONS=true npm run test:live --prefix backend && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:all:read: npm run type-check && npm run test:security && npm run test:live:read
